description_long: This object is a solar energy infrastructure installation featuring two distinct arrays of photovoltaic panels mounted on robust metal frameworks. The larger array is centrally positioned and elevated on a truss-like structure, providing shade and maximizing sun exposure, while a smaller array is set at an angle on one side. The base platform includes various equipment housings, likely for inverters, batteries, or control units, and is segmented with marked zones and ramps, suggesting integration with urban environments such as parking lots or service areas. The structure is primarily composed of metallic materials, with visible support beams and a grid-like arrangement of solar panels. The installation is designed for fixed placement and appears capable of supporting additional equipment or light pedestrian activity on certain flat surfaces. The overall design emphasizes durability, accessibility for maintenance, and efficient solar energy capture.
description: A large, fixed solar energy installation with two angled solar panel arrays on sturdy metal frames, integrated with equipment housings and a segmented base platform. Designed for urban environments, it features robust construction and efficient solar capture.
description_view_0: Side view showing both the large central solar array and the smaller angled array, with clear visibility of the segmented base and equipment housings.
description_view_1: Frontal view dominated by the large elevated solar array, with the base platform and entry ramps visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the structural supports, the smaller array, and the full length of the base platform.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the smaller solar array and the back of the main structure, with equipment housings and platform details visible.
attribute_panel_orientation: Panels are tilted at approximately 25-30 degrees, with the main array facing forward; orientation appears fixed.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted on steel posts and truss frames with visible metallic supports.
attribute_array_configuration: Two separate arrays: one large central array (approx. 3x4 grid) and one smaller side array (approx. 2x3 grid), both elevated and angled.
